# ChildProcessLauncher delegate

A factory that (re)launches a fresh child process — used for restart (spec §8.6.4; R-8.6.4-a).

```csharp
public delegate IChildProcess ChildProcessLauncher();
```

## Return Value

A freshly launched child process.
